items.title: Hard for Eli Lilly to move significantly higher from here in the short-term: Kessef Capital's Yaffee
items.description: Len Yaffee, Kessef Capital, join 'Fast Money' to talk Amgen's obesity drug, Eli Lilly's current stock action, and much more.

items.title: CMS Slashes Prices Of 15 Major Drugs - Here's Why Pharma Valuations Won't Suffer
items.description: Discover how new U.S. Medicare drug price cuts impact major pharma stocks like Novo Nordisk and why sector resilience supports a strong outlook. Click for more.

items.title: Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services Unveils $12 Billion Net Savings From Reduction in Drug Prices
items.description: The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services said Tuesday it expects to achieve net savings of 44%,

items.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog NVIDIA, AT&T and Amgen
items.description: NVIDIA, AT&T, and Amgen outperform peers as AI growth, 5G expansion, and strong drug sales drive investor optimism.
